get_items.sql: SELECT * FROM items WHERE (:state IS NULL OR state = :state) LIMIT :limit

add_item.sql: INSERT INTO items (name, price, state) VALUES (:name, :price, 'active')

update_item.sql: UPDATE items SET name = :name WHERE id = :id

seed.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS items (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, price REAL, state TEXT DEFAULT 'active'); INSERT INTO items (name, price, state) VALUES ('Widget', 10.5, 'active'), ('Gadget', 25.0, 'active'), ('Old', 5.0, 'archived')
